headline: How The Story Is Shifting For Strategic Education (STRA) As The US$95 Target Takes Shape
summary: The price target for Strategic Education has been reset from US$105 to US$95, with the updated fair value in the model now holding steady at US$95. Analysts link this change to a mixed setup, balancing US enrollment pressure against cost actions and AI driven efficiencies that supported Q4 EBITDA. As you read on, you will see how this evolving narrative shapes the way investors interpret both the risks and the potential reward. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. headline: How The Investment Narrative For Restaurant Brands International (QSR) Is Evolving After Investor Day
summary: Restaurant Brands International now carries a refreshed fair value estimate of US$80.00, a slight move from US$79.96 that keeps the modeled price target essentially unchanged. This fine tuning comes as analysts weigh upbeat reactions to investor day against more cautious views that still see the story as a show me setup, especially around Burger King U.S., international expansion, and capital spending needs. As you read on, you will see how these subtle price target shifts fit into the...
